WARNING: CTO variant (820-02443, X2719 MLB-C). Page numbers differ from base A2442 (820-02098). Key CTO differences: SVR AON 42A, Viper 3 stage pages, Monaco 5 instances.
extraction_notes: Extracted from 164-page CTO schematic PNGs. Pro/Max BOM variants noted where applicable. CTO adds Monaco instances C2 and C3 for Max GPU phases.

ics.description: Main SoC. Pro has 8-core CPU + 14/16-core GPU. Max has 10-core CPU + 24/32-core GPU. CTO variant supports full Max GPU config via extended Monaco instances.

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator (42A design)
ics.description: 42A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. CTO UPGRADE: 42A design (base A2442: 30A). BOM thresholds: BOM0=30A, BOM1=35A, BOM2=42A. 3-phase with summing amp for ISENSE/ILIMIT. Component range: R57xx, C57xx, R58xx, C58xx.
ics.cto_difference: 42A design vs base 30A — higher current capacity for Max GPU power delivery

ics.description: Slave PMU with 22+ system bucks (BUCK0-BUCK21, BUCK15 not used on p7 designs). VODCOM Vout=3.7V shared by SMC.
Master PMU with 10+ system bucks (BUCK1-BUCK10). Has Pro vs Max BOM variant table (checkerboard, page 42). JM8170 companion IC nearby.
ics.bom_variants: Pro and Max have different BOM options for GPU power phases. CTO supports full Max GPU config.

ics.description: Multi-phase voltage regulator controller for high-current SoC PCPU domains. CTO has 3 power stage pages (49-51) vs base 2 (48-49). Viper Power Stages 3 (page 51) is CTO-only with additional phases for Max variant. Differential-twisted routing required.
ics.cto_difference: 3 power stage pages (additional phases for Max CPU clusters)

ics.designator: Monaco VR (5 instances: C0, C1, C2, C3, C4)
ics.function: Monaco multi-output VR — GPU/fabric/SoC dynamic domains
ics.description: Custom Apple ORCT_TABLE IC. CTO has 5 instances: Monaco 0 (C0, page 52), Monaco 1 (C1, page 53), Monaco 2 (C2, page 54 — CTO-only), Monaco 3 (C3, page 55 — CTO-only), Monaco 4 (C4, page 56). Base A2442 only has 3 instances (C0, C1, C4). Monaco 2 and 3 provide additional GPU power phases for Max variant.
ics.cto_difference: 5 Monaco instances (C0-C4) vs base 3 (C0, C1, C4). Instances C2 and C3 are CTO-only for Max GPU phases.

ics.description: Main charger IC. Multi-FET input stage (PG5x1-PG5x9 area). Converts USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.14V, 3.1A max, 1.25MHz). Low power option. Startup 4.7/7.5/10.5ms.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Left port 0. ORCT_TABLE IC with SPI ROM.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Left port 1.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC2
ics.description: RIGHT port. Different designator prefix (UG vs UF) from left ports.
Handles HDMI output. ORCT_TABLE IC. Component range RKT4x, CK5xx. BOM ALTERNATES table.
Controls SD card slot. Component range CR5xx, FR5xx. Has LR500 inductor for power.
Dedicated NAND controller. Two instances: SSD0 Ocarina (page 106) and SSD1 Ocarina (page 111). Component range CN4xx, CN6xx, RN4xx, FL4xx.
MagSafe connector. APN: 518S0818 (from page 28). Q5401 MOSFET pair.
Secure Element IC. Same function as Ceres SE.
Located near U8100 (MPMU). Visible on page 42.
10uF capacitor on PPVBUS_USBC0 rail at ATC0 USB-C port. Used as diagnostic probe point for 20V/5V input verification on left rear port.
Capacitor on PPVBUS_USBC2 rail at ATC2 USB-C port. Used as diagnostic probe point for input verification on right port.

ics.function: Monaco VR C0 output capacitor (probe point)
ics.description: Capacitor in Monaco 0 (Instance C0) output area. Part of CA100-CA171 array. Used as diagnostic probe point for Monaco GPU/fabric DVFS output.
Boardview designator for PPBUS_AON output decoupling area. Schematic equivalent area: C5250-C5253 (page 29). Standard repair probe point for PPBUS_AON rail verification.
ics.note: Boardview designator; schematic uses C525x series

ics.description: Boardview designator for PP3V8_AON SVR AON output area. Schematic equivalent area: C5890-C5897 (page 35). Standard repair probe point for 3.8V AON rail.
ics.note: Boardview designator; schematic uses C589x/C5896-C5897 series

ics.description: Boardview designator for Viper VR output decoupling area. Schematic equivalent area: C9290-C9299 (page 47). Standard repair probe point for Viper PCPU DVFS output.
ics.note: Boardview designator; schematic uses C929x series

ics.description: Boardview designator for TPS62130 5V output area. Schematic equivalent area: CC270-CC273 (page 59). Standard repair probe point for PP5V_S2 rail.
ics.note: Boardview designator; schematic uses CC27x series
